{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/anthropic-vacancies/nautilus-pro2-analysis/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. nautilus-pro2-analysis

_Файлов:_ 4

h2. Содержание

* [00-question-two-nautiluses.md|00-question-two-nautiluses.md] — 
* [01-shell-metaphor-two-projections.md|01-shell-metaphor-two-projections.md] — 
* [02-nautilus-A-pro2-meta.md|02-nautilus-A-pro2-meta.md] — 
* [03-nautilus-B-meta-orchestrator.md|03-nautilus-B-meta-orchestrator.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/nautilus/community-discussions/practical-observations/README.md] (сходство 0.27)
* [README|docs/lorenzo-agent/scenarios/README.md] (сходство 0.27)
* [README|docs/nautilus/community-discussions/voiceless-contributors/README.md] (сходство 0.25)
